schema.skills: map of skill_id -> { status, started_at, completed_at, attempts, last_session_id, notes, smoke_test_result }

U1.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full universal layer + 5 profile lenses. 3 helpers (sloan_accruals, capital_allocation_scorecard, hidden_value_scanner) all py_compile clean and tested. RPAY smoke-test outputs (financial_assessment.md + metrics.json) produced; helpers executed end-to-end with illustrative inputs. Source 10-K data values flagged for refresh (existing dossier section 3.3 had TBDs).

U2.notes: SKILL.md drafted with strict six-field discipline (variant, preconditions, kill criteria, scenario tree summing to 1.0, time horizon w/ milestones, sizing inputs). Refusal protocol documented for any unmet bar. AXSM smoke-test thesis composed against existing dossier; all 6 fields pass; EV +16.55% above gate; recommendation active_position. No helpers required.

U4.notes: SKILL.md drafted with universal layer + per-profile dispatch (merger_arb, activist_governance, binary_catalyst, litigation, insider). 8 helpers all py_compile clean. Smoke test on 8 active dossiers passed: 0 archives, 3 hold, 5 manual_review. HALT_FLAG honored. Universal flags fired correctly on 6027 + LKQ status drift. AXSM binary_catalyst checker resolved AdCom kill condition cleanly via Federal Register API. No false positives.

P1.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full evaluative + forward-looking modes. Trial forensics, AdCom risk, label risk, CMC risk, class-precedent integration. 5 helpers all py_compile clean. AXSM smoke test (offline mode) produced P(approval)=0.70 range 0.61-0.79, broadly consistent with the active AXSM dossier's 60-70% estimate. P2 dependency handled via graceful 'unavailable' path with conservative anchor.

P2.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full methodology (class resolution, openFDA approvals, EDGAR CRL discovery, Federal Register AdCom history, sponsor FDA fingerprint, Wilson CI synthesis). 5 helpers all py_compile clean. Smoke test on AXS-05 (offline) produced approval_rate_class=0.667 (n=2/3, Wilson CI 21-94%), AdCom rate 20% (Psychiatry division), boxed-warning rate 50%, sparse-class flag set. End-to-end integration with P1 verified.

P3.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full universal layer + activist_governance dispatch. 6 helpers all py_compile clean. Offline smoke test on Forager Fund + RPAY produced 4 illustrative campaigns, success_rate=0.667 (Wilson CI 0.21-0.94), tier_classification=emerging, this_filer_vs_tier_1=below_threshold. Per-campaign outcome+source URL+confidence rendered. International extensions stub emits empty arrays with data_quality_notes flag.

P4.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full universal layer + per-jurisdiction regulatory dispatch (17 jurisdictions). 5 helpers all py_compile clean. Offline smoke test on BAWAG / PTSB / IE produced 6 illustrative prior deals: 100% close_rate, avg time-to-close 205d, avg premium 21.67%. Tier classification: established_strategic. All four expected_output_features present. Foreign-filer fallback (acquirer_id_type=name_only) triggered correctly because BAWAG has no EDGAR presence.

P5.notes: SKILL.md drafted with 5-pass methodology (party resolution, outcome tree, magnitude, time-to-resolution, discounted EV) + synthesis. 6 helpers all py_compile clean. Two smoke tests passed: LR-26539 auto-archives (no publicly-traded defendant) with overall_confidence=0.10; offline-illustrative happy path on synthetic securities-fraud produces full pipeline EV=-$5.82M, ev_pct=-0.13%, band=minimal, overall_confidence=0.76. CourtListener Q-017 auth blocker handled gracefully.

M1.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full methodology: per-profile source dispatch, OpenFIGI ticker resolution with JP 5-char Q-003 fix, deterministic event_id derivation per source, bounded budget (20s wall-clock, 150 events/invocation), checkpointing every 50 events, atomic write per D-052. 6 helpers all py_compile clean. Offline smoke test on merger_arb DEFM14A+S-4 2020-2024 target_n=20 produced 20 events; 100% have CIK+filed_at+form_type+ticker. Out-of-scope short_positioning rejected cleanly.

M2.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full universal layer + 5-profile classifier dispatch. 5 helpers all py_compile clean. Offline smoke test on M1 output (20 merger_arb events) produced 11 HIT / 9 MISS in 0.15s, all events have all 5 forward-return windows + canonical-window outcome. Idempotent re-run: 0 deltas. Profile-mismatch error path returns recoverable=false. All 5 profile classifiers dry-run green.

M3.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full per-profile dispatch, iter-4 schema mirrored exactly per profile, sidecar lookup priority (Option-A by accession, binary_catalyst Option-B by event_id), confidence scoring rules, D-097 RESOLVER_LEAKAGE_FEATURES detector wired from learning_loop.py:819. 9 helpers all py_compile clean. Smoke test on M2 output (20 merger_arb events) produced 20 features-matrix rows with 100% sidecar match, 0 imputations, all confidence at 0.85, leakage_verdict=no_overlap.

U3.notes: SKILL.md drafted with full universal layer + per-profile bucket+sidecar dispatch. Profile-weighted K-NN over iter-4 features with z-score standardization (RAW_SCALE_DROP_FROM_DESIGN lesson honored). 5 helpers (atomic_write, knn_distance, reference_class_aggregator, sparse_handling, analyze) all py_compile clean. Smoke tests on RPAY (activist_governance): K=5 neighbors returned (IMAX, EchoStar, Golden Matrix, Viasat, nCino — all HIT), distance 0.17-0.33, hit_rate=1.0, confidence 0.90 caller_provided / 0.54 inline-synthetic. Cross-profile sanity check on merger_arb (CERO M3-extracted) returned K=5 confidence 0.85. All 4 expected_output_features verified. synthetic_return_imputation correctly flagged because activist HIT/MISS ledger labels lack concrete return_pct (50/50 missing). Edit-tool null-padding bug encountered on analyze.py mid-edit and remediated via bash content-rebuild.

P6.notes: SKILL.md drafted with 5-dimension methodology (ownership_concentration x1.5, board_defenses x2.0 with vulnerability=10-defenses inversion, strategic_fit x2.0, financial_attractiveness x1.5, activist_pressure x1.0). 5 helpers (atomic_write, ownership_concentration, board_defenses_extractor, comp_multiples (3 sub-helpers), analyze) all py_compile clean. Smoke test on PASG (most-recent takeover_candidate_scanner signal, strategic-review 8-K) produced vulnerability_score=72.9/100, band=HIGH, expected_timeline median 8mo (range 4-14), 3 acquirers ranked (Pfizer/Sarepta/Roche), confidence 0.25 (offline-illustrative all-imputed floor). Sector-specific acquirer pool dispatch verified — GIPR Tech-Software returned Microsoft/Salesforce/Vista. Error path 'ticker_not_in_scanner_output' verified clean. All 3 expected_output_features verified.
